description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and a compact, modern silhouette. The barrel is ribbed for grip and durability, and the body includes a prominent pump mechanism beneath the barrel, suggesting a pump-action operation. The stock is short and angled, resembling a pistol grip, which enhances maneuverability in close-quarters urban environments. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement and control. There are small orange indicator panels on both sides of the receiver, possibly for safety or status indication. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for ergonomic handling.
description: A compact, matte black pump-action shotgun with a ribbed barrel, pistol grip stock, and orange indicator panels, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and ribbed barrel, with the pump grip visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ribbed barrel, pump mechanism, pistol grip stock, and orange indicator panel.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the ribbed barrel and the overall linear profile of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the pump, pistol grip, and a second orange indicator panel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed exterior and no visible venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
